assumptions: No NVIDIA Developer Program membership, NVIDIA account session for the API Catalog, or NVIDIA Developer API key is assumed.
A browser and a Python environment able to run the model-page sample are available; no local NVIDIA GPU is assumed.

developer_goal: Join the NVIDIA Developer Program (or sign in with an NVIDIA account), obtain an API Catalog API key from build.nvidia.com, and receive a hosted NIM chat-completions response.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated request using the API Catalog key returns chat-completions model output from a hosted NIM (API Catalog quickstart example: meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct) via POST https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions.
first_success.observable_signal: The Python sample completes and the response includes model-generated text for the requested prompt.

route_selection.surface: NVIDIA NIM API Catalog hosted quickstart (Developer Program API key + Python)
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: NVIDIA NIM API Catalog hosted quickstart (Developer Program API key + Python)
candidates.reason: Official API Catalog Quickstart documents Get API Key → Developer Program/NVIDIA account → Python sample against hosted NIM, but signup-field opacity and live Copy Code client pins are not fully closed for a verified count.

candidates.name: API Catalog web Preview UI only
candidates.reason: Same quickstart documents browser Preview chat; peer to the authenticated API path rather than first developer API success.

candidates.name: Raw HTTP POST to integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions
candidates.reason: LLM APIs reference documents the endpoint; the quickstart primary client path is the model-page Python sample.

candidates.name: Self-hosted NIM containers / Run NIM Anywhere local deploy
candidates.reason: Later GPU/container path after hosted catalog prototyping.

required_path.action: Open build.nvidia.com, open a catalog model page (quickstart example: meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct), click Get API Key, and complete NVIDIA account creation or sign-in (Developer Program).

required_fields.label: NVIDIA account password (new accounts)
required_fields.notes: Quickstart documents password setup for new accounts; full signup field set is not enumerated.

required_path.observable_result: Authenticated Developer Program session redirected to the model page.

required_path.action: Copy the new API Catalog API key and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: An API key value is available locally.

required_path.action: Copy the model-page Python sample and replace API_KEY_REQUIRED_IF_EXECUTING_OUTSIDE_NGC with the API key.
required_path.observable_result: Runnable Python sample with the API key set.

required_path.action: Run the Python sample so it POSTs an authenticated chat-completions request to https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions and confirm model output text.
required_path.observable_result: Successful chat-completions JSON includes model-generated text.

prerequisites.description: An NVIDIA account with Developer Program membership created or confirmed through the Get API Key signup flow on build.nvidia.com.
An NVIDIA Developer / API Catalog API key created via Get API Key and stored securely.
A Python environment able to run the model-page sample. No local NVIDIA GPU or CUDA Toolkit is required for hosted endpoints.

external_gates.description: Wrong user role or entitlement can block hosted endpoint consumption or NIM container pulls.

platform_outcomes.description: Run the API Catalog Python sample against a hosted NIM

excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.
Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

excluded.item: CUDA Toolkit / local GPU sample paths
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.
Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

sources.title: API Catalog Quickstart Guide
evidence_supported: Get API Key / Developer Program signup
Copy Key and Copy Code Python sample

sources.title: Run NIM Anywhere
evidence_supported: Developer Program free hosted NIM API access for prototyping

uncertainties.question: What exact current signup fields does Get API Key show for a brand-new NVIDIA account, and which peer client route (Python sample vs raw HTTP) is the lexicographic shortest verified path?
uncertainties.impact: Without closed signup fields and a locked client choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated read-only walkthrough of live Get API Key signup fields and the live model-page Copy Code snippet.

uncertainties.question: Which exact client library and package pins does the live model-page Copy Code sample currently emit?
uncertainties.impact: Configure/execute may require installing whatever client the pane currently copies.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Capture of the current build.nvidia.com Copy Code sample for meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.
